checklist.title: Getting started
checklist.addNode: Add an assistant to the canvas
checklist.done: Nice work — you built and ran your first workflow! 🎉

directory.heading: Where does your code live?
directory.description: rondoflow works with your local files through Claude Code. Point it to your project folder.
directory.hint: This can be changed later in Workspace settings.

error.required: A working directory is required for rondoflow to function.

cli.notDetected: Claude Code not detected — install it first

auth.hintTail: to use your Claude subscription. You can also add it later in Settings.

workMode.heading: How do you want to work?
workMode.description: Choose how much control you want. You can switch modes anytime in Settings.

quick.title: Quick Start
quick.description: Describe what you want, rondoflow handles the rest. Best for trying things out.

full.title: Full Control
full.description: Build agent teams with skills, safety rules, and custom workflows. For power users.

firstAction.heading: Describe your task.
firstAction.description: Type what needs to happen — you'll see which assistants get created and how they connect before you run anything.
firstAction.taskPlaceholder: e.g. Summarize the competition and email a report
firstAction.taskAriaLabel: Describe what you want to build

suggest.research: Research the market and prepare a report
suggest.review: Review a pull request and suggest fixes
suggest.data: Process a CSV, clean the data and save it

gallery.heading: Templates
gallery.hint: or describe a task on the left and we'll assemble it

preview.heading: Preview
preview.caption: Roughly what we'll build — review and tweak after it's created.

folderPicker.title: Select Project Folder
folderPicker.footerHint: Double-click to enter a folder. Click "Select" to use the current folder.
